---
bibliography: references.bib
---

# Mentorship academy

## Curriculum

Retreat October 10, 2026 (?Zoom)

Monthly mentoring sessions 1hr
Zoom meetings in June/jam
Four Zoom meetings

## Residency environment

Education + Service

Residency selection - How do residents choose a specialty?

- Geograpy
- Quality of training
Academic reputation

1999 - Unions
2003 - Duty Hours restrictions
2004 - NRBP Anti-trust - exempted by Congress
2011 - Residents pay FICA

### Current priorities in residency selection

Current resident satisfaction
Level of concern program has for trainee'
Perception of "fit"


## Dehuminization
Corporitization


burnout - bilimoria
[] Look for NEJM article by Bilimoria

## Anti-humanisitb 
Prejudice against 


Optimal learnin environment

$\Rightarrow$ Professional Identity/Community of Practice. Cruess Acad Med 2014


How can mentors foster professional identity development?

Barna: Discipleship is holding each other accountable
- Supportive
